examples: The studies on unpolluted deoxidization using solid electrolyte in melt were introduced.
This paper introduces the experiments of deep deoxidization and desulphurization in ladle with carbonaceous synthetic slag.
Cyclic voltammetry curve showed obvious oxidation and deoxidization peaks, corresponding to the flats of charge and discharge.
